steps.title: 1. Onboarding
steps.description: A few questions about your goals, timeline, and assets.

steps.title: 2. Research, Design & Develop
steps.description: We study your market, audience, and competitors. Then design and develop.

steps.title: 3. Launch
steps.description: You receive all files and assets. We handle handoff and launch.

booking.title: Book an intro call
booking.subtitle: Pick a time that works for you. You'll get a calendar invite and a short prep note so we make the most of 30 minutes.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Got questions? Great! Let's clear some things up.

items.question: How long does a project take?
items.answer: It depends on the project. Landing page design takes 10 days. With development, 14 days. Full branding is 14 days. For larger Apps, Websites or complex projects, timing varies — book a call and we'll give you a clear timeline.

items.question: Do you handle development or just design?
items.answer: Both. We design and develop in Next.js and React. We use Rive for animations. If you need an MVP built, contact us and we'll discuss scope.

items.question: How does the delivery process work?
items.answer: Once you submit a request, our team reviews the brief. You'll receive an initial draft within 48 hours. We work closely with you, incorporating feedback until you're 100% satisfied.

items.question: Is there a limit to design requests?
items.answer: No limit! However, we work on one request at a time to ensure maximum quality and focus. Once a design is approved, we immediately jump to the next one in your queue.

items.question: How fast will I receive my designs?
items.answer: For most requests, you can expect an initial draft within 48 hours. Larger projects like full platform designs may take slightly longer, but we maintain constant communication.

items.question: What if I don't like the design?
items.answer: Your satisfaction is our priority. We offer unlimited revisions and will refine the design until it matches your vision perfectly.

items.question: Can I get a refund?
items.answer: We allocate dedicated time and resources to each client, so we don't offer refunds. However, we offer the flexibility to pause your service at any time and resume when you're ready.

footer.tagline: The dedicated design and development team for startups who need results, not just pretty pictures.
